zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Gascoigne是Willem Sir Gascoigne VIII的女兒，於大約1386年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾希亞活。她於1416年與Sir Robert Constable VI在英國英格蘭越可爾福藍波洛結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1466年在英國林可爾史爾素斯 凱爾西享年81歲，埋葬在英國越可爾福藍波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Gascoigne是Willem Sir Gascoigne VIII的女儿，于大约1386年出生在英国英格兰越可爾希亞活。她于1416年与Sir Robert Constable VI在英国英格兰越可爾福藍波洛结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1466年在英国林可爾史爾素斯 凱爾西享年81岁，埋葬在英国越可爾福藍波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Gascoigne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Gascon, Middle English Gascoun, Gascon ‘Gascon, native of Gascony’ or the adjective Gascuinz ‘of Gascony’. The name of the region derives from that of the Basques, who are found close by and formerly extended into this region as well; they are first named in Roman sources as Vascōnes, but the original meaning of the name derived from a root eusk- in the non-Indo-European language that they still speak today, is completely obscure. By the Middle Ages the Basques had been displaced from most of Gascony by speakers of Gascon (a dialect of Occitan, related to French), who were proverbial for their boastfulness. In the 11th century Gascony united with Aquitaine and was thus held by England between 1154 and 1453.

variants.name: Gascon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Jaime, Mario, Miguel, Rafael, Ruben, Amado, Ana, Ana Maria, Angel, Caridad.  French Andre, Chantal, Jean-Guy, Jean-Philippe, Monique, Serge, Simonne.
French; Spanish (Gascón): habitational name for someone from the province of Gascony, Old French Gascogne (see Gascoigne ). This surname is also found in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Gascoigne was born about 1386, in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Willem Sir Gascoigne VIII. She married Sir Robert Constable VI in 1416, in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1466, in South Kelsey, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Gascoigne est née environ 1386, à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Willem Sir Gascoigne VIII. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Constable VI en 1416, à Flamborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1466, à South Kelsey, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Flamborough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes Gascoigne wurde um 1386 in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Willem Sir Gascoigne VIII geboren. Sie hat 1416 in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Robert Constable VI geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1466 im Alter von 81 Jahren in South Kelsey, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Robert Constable VI nel 1416, nel Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1466, nel South Kelsey, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Flamborough, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Gascoigneは約1386年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドでWillem Sir Gascoigne VIIIの娘として生まれた。1416年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアフランボロウでSir Robert Constable VIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1466年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアソウス ケルセイで81歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアフランボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.Givendale, West Riding, Yorkshire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지븐데일 비 리폰
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Gascoigne(은)는 대략 1386년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 하레우드에서 Willem Sir Gascoigne VIII의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1416년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플램루에서 Sir Robert Constable VI(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1466년 영국 링코실르 소우스 켈시에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 플램루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes Gascoigne nasceu aproximadamente 1386, em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Willem Sir Gascoigne VIII. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Constable VI em 1416, em Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1466, em South Kelsey, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Givendale, West Riding, Yorkshire, Engla: гивендеил би рипон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Gascoigne родилась около 1386 г. в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Willem Sir Gascoigne VIII. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Constable VI в 1416 г. в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1466 г. в местности соут келси, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Robert Constable VI en 1416, en Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1466, en South Kelsey, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
